description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa upholstered in a soft, blue-gray fabric with a quilted diamond pattern on the lower front, side panels, and backrest cushions. The sofa features thick, padded armrests that are slightly rounded and extend to the same height as the backrest, providing a cozy and enclosed seating area. The seat and back cushions are generously filled, with the back cushions displaying a subtle quilted texture for added visual interest. The base of the sofa is supported by short, block-style legs in a contrasting yellow color, which are only partially visible and give the sofa a low-profile appearance. The overall silhouette is boxy yet inviting, with smooth transitions between the armrests, seat, and backrest. This sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as public lounges, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern blue-gray two-seater sofa with quilted diamond-patterned upholstery, thick padded armrests, and yellow block-style legs. The design is boxy, low-profile, and visually inviting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded armrest and the quilted side panel, with the yellow leg partially visible at the base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two large seat cushions, two quilted backrest cushions, and the symmetrical armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the armrest, quilted side panel, and yellow leg.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the continuous back panel with subtle quilting and the sofa's overall boxy shape.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all attached and uniform in size, with quilted detailing on the back cushions.
attribute_armrest_style: Thick, padded armrests at seat height, slightly rounded with a continuous profile, fully upholstered in the same fabric as the sofa.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs in yellow, positioned at the corners and partially recessed, with a simple, sturdy appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two attached, quilted cushions forming a continuous support across the width.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Quilted diamond pattern on the lower front, side panels, and backrest cushions; the rest of the upholstery is smooth and solid blue-gray.
